description: A client is transferring their assets to another institution and wants to close their account.

nodes.task_description: Receive the ACATS transfer request from the other institution.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives and validates the Automated Customer Account Transfer Service request.

nodes.task_description: Liquidate any non-transferable assets as per client instructions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sells a proprietary mutual fund and sweeps the cash.

nodes.task_description: Transfer all assets and close the account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully completes the ACATS transfer, leaving a zero balance, and closes the account.
